Player speaks at airport before joining Chelsea – Excited to get to Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: Defender Aaron Anselmino has revealed his move to Chelsea this month came about suddenly and certainly wasn’t planned. TyC Sports cover comments from the defender today after he was stopped at Ezeiza Airport by ESPN before catching a flight to move to Chelsea.
